attacking_style: Launches solo attacks from small breakaway groups on final climbs, typically when cooperation among rivals breaks down. Shows willingness to commit early but struggles to sustain on steepest gradients.
team_tactics: DSM deploys him as breakaway animator with autonomy to attack when group dynamics fracture. Positioned as first responder to dangerous moves but lacks sustained domestique support in finale.
terrain_preference: Final climbs with moderate gradients where sustained power matters more than explosive watts. Thrives in small group dynamics where tactical timing can compensate for raw power deficits.
vulnerability: Steep final ramps expose lack of reserves after initial response efforts. Cannot sustain pursuit when required to chase down accelerations on maximum gradients after early expenditure.
key_patterns: Attacks solo from breakaway groups on final climbs when positioned (2 observations)
First to respond to dangerous moves but lacks reserves to complete pursuit (2 observations)
Exploits breakaway cooperation breakdowns to gain advantage through tactical timing (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 showed inability to sustain efforts after initial response, suggesting declining top-end power compared to 2021 attacking effectiveness
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 9
